title: CRM Cost-Free Acquisition Forensics (Updated with Prebonding Intelligence)

breakthrough_intelligence.mechanic: Prebonding period - early purchases appear as allocations
breakthrough_intelligence.quote: CRM is a Bags App creator coin there was a prebonding period and anyone who purchased then would look like they received free supply
breakthrough_intelligence.impact: Peter's 28.67M CRM likely legitimate prebonding purchase

executive_summary.key_finding: Peter's 28.67M likely legitimate prebonding; HLnpSz9h and network manipulation remains suspicious
executive_summary.threat_assessment: NETWORK STILL HOLDS 13.26% - STABILITY BOMB REMAINS

method_1_prebonding.name: Bags.app Prebonding Allocation (LEGITIMATE)
method_1_prebonding.description: Peter's 28.67M CRM acquired during Bags.app prebonding period. Purchases during prebonding appear as allocations without visible buy txs in APIs. Per CRM founder, this is expected behavior.
method_1_prebonding.legal_significance: LIKELY LEGITIMATE - not fraud if purchased during prebonding
method_1_prebonding.threat_level: MEDIUM - Single wallet holding 2.87% of supply

method_2_dust_transfers.name: Dust-Fee Internal Accounting
method_2_dust_transfers.description: 30+ transfers Dec 28-31, 2025 at 0.0020 SOL each (~$0.20). Internal accounting between controlled wallets. HLnpSz9h's source is still under investigation.
method_2_dust_transfers.legal_significance: Money laundering pattern - minimal fees to obscure transfer trail

method_3_free_allocation.name: Direct Free Allocation
method_3_free_allocation.description: BKLBtcJQJ2 received 36.7M CRM on Nov 27, 2025 at $0 cost. No purchase transaction. Likely 'team' or 'marketing' allocation. Immediately dumped to suppress price.
method_3_free_allocation.legal_significance: Market manipulation - Received free tokens solely to dump and suppress price

method_4_wash_trading.name: Wash Trading (Crash and Load)
method_4_wash_trading.description: BKLBtcJQJ2 dumps 41M CRM to crash price. 67 minutes later, HPVUJGJwJ reloads 17.4M at the depressed price. Same entity controlling both sides of the trade.

hlnp_sz9h_suspicious.status: #1 holder - source unknown, actively feeding network

updated_conclusions.prebonding_clarification: Peter's wallet is likely legitimate prebonding purchase, not criminal allocation
